Package org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core

Class StandaloneSonarLintEngineImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.AbstractSonarLintEngine
      • org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.StandaloneSonarLintEngineImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SonarLintEngine, StandaloneSonarLintEngine
    public final class StandaloneSonarLintEngineImpl
extends AbstractSonarLintEngine
implements StandaloneSonarLintEngine

      • getAllRuleDetails

        public Collection<StandaloneRuleDetails> getAllRuleDetails()
        Description copied from interface: StandaloneSonarLintEngine
        Return rule details of all available rules for SonarLint standalone mode. For now, excluding hotspots and rule templates.
        Specified by:
        getAllRuleDetails in interface StandaloneSonarLintEngine

      • getPluginDetails

        public Collection<PluginDetails> getPluginDetails()
        Description copied from interface: SonarLintEngine
        Get information about the analyzers that are currently loaded. Should only be called when engine is started.
